analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces an International Advisory Group statement on reforming Ukraine’s Security Service (SSU) and tags EU, NATO, US Embassy, and Ukraine’s parliament/SSU. It signals involvement of international partners but provides no value judgments or claims about the EU. Evaluation: EU1 (EU success story) – not promoted; no reference to EU history or success. EU2 (EU united) – not promoted; no mention of EU unity or agreement among member states. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – not applicable; this concerns Ukraine, not EU internal benefits. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – not promoted; no pioneering regulatory leadership claim. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes) – not explicitly; while partners are tagged, no claim about defending rights. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – not clearly promoted; the tweet implies international engagement in Ukrainian reform but does not state the EU’s contribution or impact. Conclusion: No listed narratives are explicitly promoted.
